name.description: The name of the contact. For API-created locations with a non-GLP email, append "NONGLP" to the name (e.g., "John Doe NONGLP").

phoneNumber.description: The phone number associated with the contact.

failedCount.description: The number of failed location creations.

contacts.description: Locations must have one primary contact but can have more than one of the other contact types.

description.description: A long description of the location.

name.description: Provide a descriptive name for the location.

validatedByName.description: The name of the workspace user that validated the location.

validationCycle.description: An integer that defines how long, in months, the location remains validated.

validationExpired.description: A boolean confirming whether the location validation has expired or not.

id.description: The unique identifier of the tag.

City(Required).description: The city of the location to be created.

Country(Required).description: The country of the location to be created.

First Name(Required).description: First name of the primary contact. Required only when the email provided is a NON GLP email.

Last Name(Required).description: Last name of the primary contact. Required only when the email provided is a NON GLP email.

Location Name(Required).description: The name of the location to be created.

Primary Contact Email(Required).description: The email of the primary contact.

State/Province(Required).description: The state of the location to be created.

Street Address(Required).description: The street address of the location to be created.

Tag 1 Name (optional).description: Tag name associated with the location.

Tag 1 Value (optional).description: Tag value for the tag name associated with the location.

Zip/Postal Code(Required).description: The postal code of the location to be created.

Bearer.description: Personal access token issued by the HPE GreenLake platform.

info.description: Service to manage location information for HPE GreenLake platform.
info.title: Locations API

get.description: Retrieve location information for all locations.

parameters.description: The zero-based resource offset to start the response from.
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: The maximum number of results to be returned.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description:
Limit the resources operated on by an endpoint or when used with a multiple-GET endpoint, return only the subset of resources that match the filter. The filter grammar is a subset of OData 4.0.

This API can be filtered by `name`.

**NOTE:** The filter query parameter must use [URL encoding](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/URL_encoding). Most clients do this automatically with inputs provided to them specifically as query parameters. Encoding must be done manually for any query parameters provided as part of the URL. The reserved characters `!` `#` `$` `&` `'` `(` `)` `*` `+` `,` `/` `:` `;` `=` `?` `@` `[` `]` must be encoded with percent encoded equivalents.

contains.description: Return locations that contain a name that matches the one provided.

eq.description: Return locations belonging to the city that matches the one provided.

equals.description: Return locations belonging to the country that matches the one provided.

parameters.name: filter

post.description: Create a location and store its associated information.

get.description: Geolocate a location by providing the longitude and latitude. Optionally, provide an ISO language code to return the information in a language different from the default (English).

parameters.description: (Optional) Specify a language code to return the location information in that language. The default is English.

equals.description: Return the location description in Simplified Chinese.

parameters.name: language

get.summary: Retrieve location from latitude and longitude.

get.description: Return status information for a CSV location upload by using the async location ID as a parameter.

parameters.description: The unique indentifier of the async operation location ID. For example, `945e70ec-b043-4cad-9ed0-069c06fdb8af`.
parameters.name: id

post.description: Create locations using a CSV file and store the associated information.

get.description: Retrieve tag information for your workspace.

parameters.description: The zero-based resource offset to start the response from.
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: The maximum number of results to be returned.
parameters.name: limit

patch.description:
Use this API to create or delete a tag. In the request body, provide:
  • The tag name and tag value in the appropriate array to create (`createTags`) or delete (`deleteTags`) tags as needed.
  • The location ID.

get.description: Return a listing of all tag names and tag values for a given location. If a location has no tags, only the location ID and location name are returned.

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the location. For example, `945e70ec-b043-4cad-9ed0-069c06fdb8af`.
parameters.name: id

get.summary: Retrieves tags for given a location

patch.description: Manage the location information for a location specified by its location ID. Provide information in the request body schema to create, update, or delete the location's address, contact, or location details. Only include the fields that need to be modified in the request body. Fields that are not included will remain unchanged.

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the location. For example, `945e70ec-b043-4cad-9ed0-069c06fdb8af`.
parameters.name: id

delete.description: Delete a location by providing a specific location ID.

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the location. For example, `945e70ec-b043-4cad-9ed0-069c06fdb8af`.
parameters.name: id

get.description: Return information for a location specified by a location ID.

parameters.description: The unique indentifier of the location. For example, `945e70ec-b043-4cad-9ed0-069c06fdb8af`.
parameters.name: id

patch.description:
Update a location's information by specifying its location ID. Only include the fields that need to be updated in the request body. Fields that are not included in the request body will remain unchanged.

**Note:** The `name` and `locationType` fields are mandatory and cannot be set to empty or invalid values.

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the location.
parameters.name: id

403.description: Forbidden - The location name or locationType is empty or invalid. Both fields are mandatory and must contain valid values.
